# `CopyFullScreen`

**Systems:** X16,C64, MEGA65, PLUS4, C128, VIC20, PET,  NES  
**Parameters:** `a,a`

***

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>CopyFullScreen( [address 1], [address 2] );</h3>
<ul>
<li>[address 1] - source address</li>
<li>[address 2] - destination address</li>
</ul>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>Copies exactly 40*25 = 1000 bytes from the source address to destination address.</p>


<h3>Example</h3>

<code>
CopyFullScreen(^$0400, ^$4400); // Copies screen memory from bank 0 ($0400) to bank 1 ($4400)
</code>


</div>
